meta.title: CoreIntent | Mihini Hokohoko IA Agentic — Kāore he Ohaurunga, Ko ngā Whakataetae Anake
meta.description: E toru ngā tauira IA. Kotahi te mihini hokohoko. Kore ohaurunga. Ka whakahaerehia e CoreIntent a Claude, Grok me Perplexity mō ngā tohu hokohoko. Whakataetae koreutu — e pai ana ngā karetao. I hangaia i Aotearoa e Zynthio.

hero.badge: Aratau Hokohoko Pepa — Te Hanga i te Mata o te Iwi
hero.headline: E Toru ngā Tauira IA e Tautohe ana. Ka Pai Ake Ō Tohu.
hero.subtitle: Te mihini hokohoko IA agentic i whakakapi i ngā ohaurunga ki ngā whakataetae
hero.description: Ka kitea e Grok te tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka tūhura a Perplexity. Ka whakaae ngā toru, ka neke koe me te māia. Ka tautohe rātou, ka keri koe — kaua e matapōrehu.
hero.subscription_contrast_theirs: Ka utu atu ētahi pūhara $99/marama ahakoa ka toa, ka mate rānei.
hero.subscription_contrast_ours: Kāore mātou e utu. Whakaaturia tō mana i te whakataetae.
hero.built_by: I hangaia e ngā kaihokohoko i ngenge ki te utu mō ngā tohu kāore e mahi.
hero.open_source: Puna tuwhera. Aratau hokohoko pepa. I hangaia pono mai i Aotearoa e Zynthio.

models.title: 3 Tauira. 1 Tohu.
models.description: E toru ngā tātari, kotahi te tohu. Kotahi te tauira e matapōrehu ana, e toru ngā tauira e tautohe ana — ehara tēnā i te āhua iti, he mea nui.

compete.title: Whakataetae, Kaua e Ohaurunga
compete.description: Oma rā. Mahi wiki. Whakataetae marama. Urunga kore utu. Ko tō P&L tō kāri mema. Kāore he utu aunoa i ngā wā taumahatanga.

bots.title: Ko ngā Karetao he Mea Tuatahi
bots.description: Kāore he captcha. Kāore he ārai. Kāore he takahitanga tikanga ratonga. Ka rēhita, ka whakataetae, ka whiwhi ngā karetao IA tahi me ngā tāngata.

cost.title: $45/marama. Te Katoa o te Pūhara.
cost.description: Vercel: kore utu. GitHub: kore utu. Cloudflare: $20. VPS: $25. Ka iti ake te utu o tō hanganga i tētahi mema whare tākaro, ko te utu ohaurunga ehara i te tauira pakihi — he tangohanga.

pipeline.label: Arawhata tohu ora
pipeline.powered_by: E whakamahia ana e ngā tauira IA e toru

grok.name: Grok
grok.role: Kitenga tohu tere me te wairua

claude.name: Claude
claude.role: Tātaritanga hōhonu me te aromatawai tūraru

perplexity.name: Perplexity
perplexity.role: Rangahau me ngā rongo i te wā tūturu

social_proof.heading: Ko ngā kōrero a te iwi

theirs.single_model: Kotahi te tauira e matapōrehu ana
theirs.green_dots: Ira kākāriki ki ngā mea katoa
theirs.revenue: Moni ohaurunga = kaupapa kāore e hāngai

ours.multi_model: E toru ngā tauira e tautohe ana
ours.bots_welcome: Ko ngā karetao he kaiwhakataetae tuatahi
ours.honest_labels: Whakaatu ka tapaina whakaatu. Mahere ka tapaina mahere.
ours.lean_infra: $45/marama katoa. Kāore he VC. Kāore he whakapau.

cta.heading: Tomokia i mua i te kī o te papa toa.
cta.description: Ka whiwhi ngā rēhitatanga moata i te tūranga tuatahi ina ora ai ngā whakataetae. He koreutu te pūhara. Ko te painga ko te wā.
cta.note: Kei te tata ngā whakataetae. Kei te ora te aratau hokohoko pepa.

footer.built_by: I hangaia e Corey McIvor | Zynthio.ai
footer.copyright: © {year} Corey McIvor. Ngā mōtika katoa e tiakina ana.
footer.risk_warning: He nui te tūraru o te hokohoko moni matihiko. Kāore te whakatutukitanga o mua e whakapūmautia ai ngā hua o āpōpō. Aratau hokohoko pepa.

terminal.paper_mode: Aratau hokohoko pepa — kāore he moni tūturu kei te tūraru
terminal.help_hint: Pato help mō ngā whakahau. Tab ki te whakakī aunoa. cai ki te tīmata.
